sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109223" key="u(postikte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπο-στικτέον</orth>, <sense id="n109223.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must put a comma,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg002:316:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Cael.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">316.19</biblScope></bibl>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
